titleStmt.title: SII 8.247: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 247. (A.R. No. 642 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE PARIJATAVANESVARASVAMIN TEMPLE AT TIRUKKALAR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ śrī śrīvallapatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattañ
cāvatu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu Ekādaśi
yum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ pā
ṇṭimaṇṭalattu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu Ok
kūruṭaiyāṉ coḻamaṇṭalattu rājendraco
ḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu tuṇṭattū
r vakaiyil centa koṭṭamāṉa pañcanetivā
ṇanallūr veṅkūr nata kaiyil paḷḷiccanta
m tirukkaḷarppaṟṟil ce ṇiyūr parampaik
kuṭi Ikkāṇiyuṭaiya ṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyatiruc
ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār cū r Akamvuṭaiyāḷ ka
ṇṇuṭainācciye pāḻināṭṭu Aracūr vā
kūruṭaiyāṉ meykkuntevar cokkanāyaṉār vicai
yakaṇṭakopālaṟku kāṇi vilaipiramāṇam pa
ṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu muṉṉāḷ Irācarācaṉ cunta
rapāṇṭiyatevar tulukkaruṭaṉ vanta nāḷile Okkūruṭai
yārum Ivaruṭaiya tampimārum Aṉaivarum Aṭiyāru tu
m cettuṅ keṭṭum poy Alaintu Ūrum veḷḷattā
lum kalakattālum pāḻḻāy Irukkiṟa Aḷavile Eṅkaḷ muta
liyār cūriyatevar kāṇiyāṭci viṭāmal niṉṟu naṭattippotukiṟa
Aḷavil Aṇṇiyūrile cikaiyuṇṭeṉṟum Itu taraveṇumeṉṟu
putuvuṭaiyar kulaicekarapiramarāyaṉ kāriyattukkukkaṭava tirunel ve
liyuṭaiyārum tirukkaivelaḻakiyārum kiḷiñalūr kiḻavaraiyum Ivarka
ḷai cāmantaṉār kāriyapper maṟittukkoṇṭupoy kāṇikkai tara
veṇum cūṟaivari taraveṇu meṉṟum cikaiyuṭpaṭa Eṇṇūṟupoṉta
raveṇu meṉṟum Ivarkaḷai celkalile koṇṭu poy ciṟaiyi
le vaittu Eṅkaḷ mutaliyār cūriyatevarai Ummuṭaiya perāle
koṭṭakattukkum Uṅkaḷ marumakaṉār tāmamaṅkalamuṭaiyār cel
lappiḷḷaiyār perāle paḷḷiccantattil Oṉṟupātikkum veṅkū
ril nilaviḻukkāṭṭukkum Āka Irunūṟu poṉṉu Āyirampoṉ
yār Iva
cakarap
m putu vūruṭaiyār
ṇṇūṟu paṇamum kiḷiñalūr kiḻavarperāle
ram paṇamum kuḷattuṭaiyār perukkum Eṅka
ḷ perukkum Āyiram paṇamum koṭṭakam paḷḷicca
vūrkaḷāle Eṇṇūṟu paṇamum Āka Eṅkaḷ pe
rāle Āyirat teṇṇūṟṟup poṉṉum maṟṟuḷḷa per
kaḷāluḷḷa paṇamum Āka Ippaṇattukku poruḷ muṉ
ṉilai Iṭṭuppoy Ippaṇam cilavaṟukkaveṇu meṉṟapa
ṭiyāle Inta putuvūruṭaiyār kiḷiñalūrkiḻavar kulaicekara
ppiramarāyar kāriyapper tirunelveliyumaiyāṟkum E
ṅkaḷ mutaliyār cūriyatevaraip puṇaikkoṇṭu Ivarkaḷai
yum peṟāḷaruṭaṉe kāṭṭikkuṭuttu Ivarkaḷum taṅkaḷ kāṇi
yum kaḷum viṟṟu taṅkaḷ perāluḷḷa paṇam cilavaṟutta
Aḷavil ceṉṟu puṇaik kaḻiyātapaṭiyāleyum Eṅkaḷ pe
rāluḷḷa paṇam vāṇātarāyar poruḷ muṉṉilaippaṭi
ye Ivarum Eṅkaḷaik koṇṭe cilavaṟuppittu Irukka
cciteyum Eṅkaḷ mutaliyārai Ummuṭaiya vaḻiyākiviṭṭava
rkaḷaik kāṭṭi tantu pomeṉṟu neṭunāḷpaṭa viṭātoḻi
kaiyil Ivarum kuvālāka ciṟaiyile kiṭantu kilecitta paṭi
Digital edition of SII 8.247 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
